summary: Iteration 32: Tested Blog newsletter fix, new landing pages, enhanced Contact form, and Admin features. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Blog page newsletter: Uses NewsletterSubscribe component (email input + subscribe button), NOT a link to /contact
Resume Builder Landing page loads at /resume-builder-info with hero, stats, features, CTA sections
Resume Analyzer Landing page loads at /resume-analyzer-info with LinkedIn optimizer mention
Cover Letter Landing page loads at /cover-letter-info with all sections
Contact page has new fields: Phone Number, Company Name, Service Interest dropdown, Budget Range dropdown
Contact form submission works with all new fields (verified via API)
Admin Landing Pages section accessible at /admin/landing-pages with 3 tabs (Resume Builder, Resume Analyzer & LinkedIn, Cover Letter Generator)
Admin SEO Manager includes Resume Builder Landing, Resume Analyzer Landing, Cover Letter Landing pages
All backend API tests passed (21/21): newsletter, contact, pages, SEO endpoints
critical_code_review_comments: BlogPage.jsx: Correctly uses NewsletterSubscribe component instead of link to /contact (line 8, 181-183)
ContactPage.jsx: New fields properly implemented with data-testid attributes (contact-phone, contact-company, contact-service, contact-budget)
content.py: Contact submission handler correctly saves all new fields (phone, company, service_interest, budget_range)
AdminSeo.jsx: SITE_PAGES array includes resume-builder-info, resume-analyzer-info, cover-letter-info (lines 25-27)
AdminLandingPages.jsx: Properly manages 3 landing pages with editable hero, stats, features, testimonials, CTA sections
Landing pages use default content when API returns 404 (graceful fallback)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 verified all new features: 1) Blog page newsletter now uses NewsletterSubscribe component with email input and subscribe button (not a redirect to /contact), 2) Three new landing pages created at /resume-builder-info, /resume-analyzer-info, /cover-letter-info with admin-editable content via /admin/landing-pages, 3) Contact page enhanced with Phone, Company, Service Interest dropdown, Budget Range dropdown fields, 4) Admin SEO Manager includes all new landing pages. Landing pages use default content when no custom content exists in database (API returns 404 but pages render with defaults).
